description_long: This is a small, rectangular juice carton with a predominantly green and white color scheme. The front features playful illustrations of trees, a sun, and a pistachio nut, along with Japanese text and branding. One side displays a detailed nutritional information panel, while another side contains allergy information and product details. The back side includes a plastic straw attached for drinking, along with instructions for opening the carton. The packaging is made of laminated paperboard, typical for single-serve juice containers, and is lightweight and portable.
description: A small green and white juice carton with playful illustrations, Japanese branding, and a plastic straw attached for drinking.
description_view_0: This view shows the nutritional information panel and barcode on the side of the carton.
description_view_1: The front view displays the main branding, colorful illustrations of trees and a sun, and a pistachio nut graphic.
description_view_2: This side features allergy and ingredient information in Japanese text.
description_view_3: The back view shows the attached plastic straw and opening instructions.
